title: Kaboom Crew Scene Extensions
description: Project-local component types for Kaboom Crew (S082+). Bomb / blast / bomber-stats / bot-brain / round-state primitives live here so engine schemas stay sample-agnostic. The engine recognises this file because it sits at <projectDir>/schemas/scene-extensions.schema.json.

bomberStatsComponent.description: Per-bomber gameplay stats. `maxBombs` caps simultaneous active bombs; `range` is blast distance in cells; `speed` is GridMover speed override; `activeBombs` is the runtime counter. `alive=false` flips on blast hit + locks GridMover.

bombComponent.description: Live bomb. `fuseRemaining` ticks down each fixedUpdate; at zero the bomb emits a BlastEvent and gets deleted. `range` is the blast distance from the bomb cell. `ownerId` is who placed it (so kill credit + activeBombs decrement land on the right BomberStats).

placeBombRequestComponent.description: Transient input request. PlayerInputSystem + BotAISystem write this on the bomber entity; BombPlacementSystem consumes + removes it the same frame.

blastEventComponent.description: Transient event written by BombFuseSystem when a bomb detonates. BlastPropagationSystem consumes + removes it the same frame.

blastTileComponent.description: Short-lived visual marker on a blast cell. Tween system fades it out + a `lifetimeRemaining` timer deletes the entity when zero. Damages bombers that share the cell while alive.

botBrainComponent.description: Bot AI tuning + scratch state. `aggression` 0..1 drives the flee-vs-bomb tradeoff; `nextDecisionIn` is a fixed-update countdown to the bot's next direction decision; `lastDecision` caches the chosen cardinal so we can prefer continuing instead of zigzagging.

roundStateComponent.description: Singleton round state. RoundResolveSystem flips `phase` to 'won' / 'lost' / 'draw' when ≤ 1 bombers remain alive. `elapsed` is wall-clock seconds since the round started; useful for the HUD timer.

roundRestartRequestComponent.description: Transient input request. PlayerInputSystem writes this on R key; RoundResolveSystem consumes it + emits a scene.load command.

agentGotoComponent.description: S82 KABOOM-AGENT-CONTROLS. Agent-supplied target cell. AgentGotoSystem reads it each frame and writes GridMover.queuedDirection toward the goal. v0 uses straight-line cardinal preference + GridMover lane-assist; BFS pathfinding is KABOOM-AGENT-PATHFIND.

agentGotoResultComponent.description: S82 KABOOM-AGENT-CONTROLS. Outcome of the last AgentGoto request. Written by AgentGotoSystem when it removes AgentGoto. `arrived` = reached target; `unreachable` = target cell was blocked when the request was issued; `stuck` = entity stopped making progress toward the target for stuckGraceFrames consecutive frames (no path with the v0 straight-line policy). Stays on the entity until the next AgentGoto request overwrites it or the host consumes it.

pickupComponent.description: Power-up item. PickupCollectSystem detects a bomber entering the same grid cell + applies the effect to BomberStats. Kinds: `bomb-up` (+1 maxBombs), `fire-up` (+1 range), `speed-up` (+1 GridMover speed).

softBlockDestroyedEventComponent.description: S82 KABOOM-PICKUPS-AND-STATS. Transient event written by BlastPropagationSystem when a soft block is destroyed. PickupSpawnSystem consumes + removes it the same fixedUpdate, rolls a deterministic-by-cell RNG, and may spawn a Pickup at the cleared cell.
